heading: Current interests
intro: I am interested in methodological work that stays grounded in socially meaningful questions and usable measurements.

cards.title: ML for Economics & Finance
cards.body: Using machine learning to model socio-economic indicators, economic disparities, and causal structure in high-stakes domains.

cards.title: Computational Social Science
cards.body: Studying social and institutional systems with data-driven methods that support interpretable empirical reasoning.

cards.title: Satellite Imagery & Remote Sensing
cards.body: Combining geospatial analysis, satellite imagery, and AI to estimate development and economic conditions where surveys are scarce.
